name: Tyler B.
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

I'm looking forward to using Synup. I've been looking for a system to help me save time creating listings across multiple websites. The process they have you take is very simple and intuitive. The Customer service was very helpful, educational and willing to work with me. Thanks!

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

It's another system I have to manage with all the other systems I'm responsible for managing. However, the gain outweighs the extra system.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

The syndication of business listings on multiple websites by only managing one.
